description.content:
Dutchie Plus headless cannabis-commerce GraphQL API (version 2021-07). All requests are HTTPS POST of a GraphQL query/variables body to https://plus.dutchie.com/plus/2021-07/graphql, authenticated with a per-retailer Bearer API key.

Operations marked [CONFIRMED] appear in the official GetDutchie/dutchie-plus-nextjs-example; [MODELED] operations are referenced in Dutchie Plus docs / the 2021-07 schema.

Note: Dutchie has announced a 2026 sunset of the Plus headless commerce API.

request.description: Return a page of products for the scoped retailer's menu.
List dispensaries/retailers on the account. Modeled from the 2021-07 schema.
List a retailer's active specials/deals. Modeled from the 2021-07 schema.
Create a new checkout for an order type and pricing type.
Add a product variant to a checkout.
Update the quantity of a checkout line item.
Remove a line item from a checkout.
Update a checkout's order type and pricing type.
Retrieve an existing checkout by id.
